name: Context Usage Breakdown
summary: Cursor has introduced a new feature that allows users to see a detailed breakdown of their agent's context usage, enhancing user experience.

name: Model Controls and Usage Analytics
summary: This update introduces new model controls and enhanced usage analytics for enterprise admins, improving management capabilities.

name: Team Marketplace Updates
summary: Admins can now create a team marketplace without prior repository connections, streamlining the process of managing plugins.

name: Flue Framework
summary: Flue is a TypeScript framework designed for building the next generation of agents, focusing on enhancing developer experience.

name: Mljar Studio
summary: Mljar Studio is a local AI data analyst that saves analysis as notebooks, providing a streamlined workflow for data analysis.
